name: line-chart
description: Multi-series smooth line chart with axes, gridlines and a left-to-right draw-in.

meta.props: { data?: LineSeries[]; width?: number; height?: number }
meta.dataShape: { label: string; points: { x: number; y: number }[] }[]
meta.example: <LineChart data={[{ label: 'Revenue', points: [{ x: 0, y: 10 }, { x: 1, y: 22 }] }]} />
